attractions.name: Dotonbori
attractions.description: Famous entertainment district with canal-side walking, riverfront benches, and light shopping & photos. Activities include flat canal-side walking, sitting along riverfront benches, and light shopping & photos
source_files: Japan/V2 - All Inclusive Guide- Japan- Sirisha.pdf

attractions.name: Universal Studios Japan
attractions.description: Theme park with movie-themed attractions and rides
source_files: Japan/V2 - All Inclusive Guide- Japan- Sirisha.pdf

attractions.name: Tonbori Riverwalk
attractions.description: Riverside walk in Dotonburi entertainment district

attractions.name: Universal Studios Osaka
attractions.description: Theme park with exciting rides and shows based on popular movies and TV shows

attractions.name: Nipponbashi
attractions.description: Anime centre of Osaka

attractions.name: Kema Sakuranomiya Park
attractions.description: A breathtaking 4+ km riverside stretch lined with thousands of cherry blossom trees

attractions.name: Osaka Castle Park
attractions.description: Historic castle grounds with gardens and moat. Activities include relaxed garden strolls (wide, flat paths), sitting near moat & shaded benches, and photography

attractions.name: Shinsaibashi-suji Shopping Street
attractions.description: A lively covered arcade perfect for browsing fashion, souvenirs, and local finds

attractions.name: Amerikamura
attractions.description: A youthful district filled with street art, vintage shops, and quirky cafés

attractions.name: Dotonbori River Cruise
attractions.description: A relaxed ride through neon-lit canals- one of the most memorable ways to experience Osaka at night

attractions.name: Expo '70 Commemorative Park
attractions.description: A vast park celebrating the 1970 World Expo, with open green spaces, seasonal flowers, and iconic structures like the Tower of the Sun

attractions.name: MinaLima Osaka art gallery
attractions.description: See original graphic designs used in the Harry Potter & Fantastic Beasts movies
source_files: Japan/V2 - All Inclusive Guide- Japan- Sirisha.pdf

attractions.name: Dotonbori District
attractions.description: Entertainment district bursting with neon lights, canal-side reflections, and the aroma of sizzling street food

attractions.name: Nakanoshima Park
attractions.description: Beautiful riverside stretch offering a calm and elegant introduction to Osaka with charming pathways, historic buildings, and quiet corners

attractions.name: Umeda Sky Building Observatory
attractions.description: Futuristic observatory with panoramic views

attractions.name: Shinsekai & Tsutenkaku Tower
attractions.description: Historic district with iconic tower

attractions.name: Shinsaibashi Shopping Street
attractions.description: Bustling shopping arcade in Osaka's vibrant fashion and entertainment district

attractions.name: Sumiyoshi Taisha Shrine
attractions.description: One of Japan's oldest shrines, known for its arched red bridge and peaceful grounds

attractions.name: Kuromon Ichiba Market
attractions.description: Nicknamed 'Osaka's Kitchen,' has been feeding locals for over a century. A lively spot to sample local specialties and browse colorful produce

attractions.name: Nakanoshima
attractions.description: Scenic island district in central Osaka, known for its riverside parks, elegant museums, and blend of historic and modern architecture
attractions.hours: Open 24 hours (museums and parks usually 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM)

attractions.name: National Museum of Art
attractions.description: Underground museum showcasing modern and contemporary art from Japan and around the world, housed in a striking architectural design
attractions.hours: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Fridays until 8:00 PM; closed Mondays)

attractions.name: Osaka Science Museum
attractions.description: Interactive exhibits and a planetarium, making science fun and engaging for visitors of all ages

attractions.name: Hozenji Yokocho Alley
attractions.description: Narrow, lantern-lit alley tucked behind Dotonbori with cobblestone path leading to intimate izakayas and the moss-covered Hozenji Temple

attractions.name: Super Nintendo World
attractions.description: Nintendo-themed area including Mario Kart ride

attractions.name: Wizarding World of Harry Potter Osaka
attractions.description: Harry Potter themed area with Hogwarts + Forbidden Journey

attractions.name: Jurassic Park The Ride Osaka
attractions.description: Dinosaur-themed water ride

attractions.name: Minion Park Osaka
attractions.description: Despicable Me themed attraction area

attractions.name: Kuchu Teien Observatory
attractions.description: Panoramic Osaka skyline views from Umeda Sky Building
